tool_args.label: B44 SBS on Nostrand Avenue Progress Report

payload.title: B44 SBS on Nostrand Avenue Progress Report

tool_args.label: MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)

payload.description: Joint lead agency for B44 SBS project

tool_args.label: NYC Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)

payload.entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation
payload.description: Joint lead agency for B44 SBS project

tool_args.label: NYC Department of Design and Construction (DDC)

payload.entity_name: NYC Department of Design and Construction
payload.description: Capital construction partner for B44 SBS project

tool_args.label: B44 SBS on Nostrand Avenue

payload.description: Conversion of B44 Limited to Select Bus Service on Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue, including bus lanes, off-board fare collection, bus bulbs, neckdowns, rerouting of northbound service to Rogers Avenue

tool_args.label: B44 SBS
B44 Local
B44 Limited
B49 Local
Nostrand Avenue

payload.description: B44 SBS project corridor from Washington Plaza to Emmons Avenue

tool_args.label: Rogers Avenue

payload.description: B44 SBS northbound corridor after rerouting from New York Avenue

tool_args.label: B44 SBS Bus Lanes

payload.description: 9.6 miles of bus lanes implemented along the B44 SBS counting both directions of travel, covering just over half of the route. Offset bus lanes on Nostrand Avenue, curbside bus lanes where space was a concern.

tool_args.label: B44 SBS Off-board Fare Collection

payload.description: Passengers pay fare using MetroCards or coins at machines at every bus stop before boarding; most customers board through any door without interfacing with operator.

tool_args.label: B44 SBS Bus Bulbs

payload.locations: Nostrand Avenue, Rogers Avenue, Bedford Avenue
payload.description: 15 bus bulbs constructed total - eight on Nostrand Avenue and seven on Rogers and Bedford Avenues. Sidewalk widened to meet offset bus lane; high curb nearly level with bus floor.

locations_normalized.raw_text: Nostrand Avenue, Rogers Avenue, Bedford Avenue

tool_args.label: B44 SBS Neckdowns

payload.locations: Intersections on project corridors identified by school safety studies
payload.description: 5 neckdowns installed at locations identified by school safety studies. Curb extensions at intersection crosswalks that shorten crossing distances.

locations_normalized.raw_text: Intersections on project corridors identified by school safety studies

tool_args.label: B44 SBS Articulated Buses

payload.description: 62-foot long, 3-door articulated buses replaced 40-foot long, 2-door B44 Limited buses; first use of such buses in Brooklyn.

tool_args.label: B44 SBS Real-time Bus Arrival Signs

payload.description: One real-time info sign installed at Church Avenue stop for Nov 2013 launch; at least 18 more stops being installed along route. Additional 18+ signs planned for 2016.

tool_args.label: B44 SBS Launch

payload.description: B44 Select Bus Service began operating on Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue

tool_args.label: B44 SBS Press Conference

payload.description: Press conference introducing B44 SBS with MTA Chairman Tom Prendergast, Mayor Michael Bloomberg, DOT Commissioner Janette Sadik-Khan, MTA Bus President Darryl Irick, and NYCT President Carmen Bianco

tool_args.label: DDC Street Reconstruction Completion

payload.description: Final completion of DDC street reconstruction project between Flushing Avenue and Atlantic Avenue, including three bus bulbs and bus lane painting

tool_args.label: Pedestrians Killed or Seriously Injured on Nostrand Avenue

payload.raw_value_text: 68 pedestrians were killed or seriously injured on Nostrand Avenue in the last 4 years
payload.scope: Nostrand Avenue from Flushing Avenue to Emmons Avenue

tool_args.label: Pedestrians Killed or Seriously Injured on Rogers Avenue

payload.raw_value_text: 22 were killed or seriously injured on Rogers Avenue between Dean Street and Farragut Road
payload.scope: Rogers Avenue between Dean Street and Farragut Road

tool_args.label: Williamsburg Bridge Bus Plaza Reconstruction

payload.description: Reconstruction of Williamsburg Bridge Bus Plaza, northern terminus for B44 SBS, through DDC. Includes street trees, sidewalk extensions, crosswalks, pedestrian islands, and site access/signal changes. NYCT building with indoor waiting area and crew facility expected summer 2016.

tool_args.label: NYCT Building Completion at Bus Plaza

payload.description: NYCT facility at Williamsburg Bridge Bus Plaza expected to be completed, including indoor waiting area and crew facility

tool_args.label: B44 SBS Rerouting to Rogers Avenue

payload.claim_text: Instead of traveling northbound north of Flatbush Avenue on New York Avenue like the B44 Limited did, the B44 SBS was moved to Rogers Avenue. The rerouting decreased the length of the northbound route from 9.9 to 9.5 miles.
payload.subject: B44 SBS

tool_args.label: Vision Zero Priority Corridors

payload.claim_text: Both Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue were identified as Vision Zero priority corridors due to their high rate of pedestrian injuries and fatalities.
payload.subject: Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue

tool_args.label: B44 Ridership Ranking

payload.claim_text: The B44 is the 3rd highest ridership bus route in Brooklyn, and the 6th highest in all of New York City.
payload.subject: B44
